text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh. My. GOSH!!!1! My first G1 race,the NHK Mile Cup, is actually here!I'm up against the lineup of mydreams! Maxed out sublime! I sodon't belong here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What in the world is it that makes<n>Umamusume
sparkle so? Today is<n>the day I find out! d-(>O<)-b
